# Paragon Exteriors LLC

> Paragon Exteriors LLC is a licensed New Jersey roofing and exterior remodeling contractor (NJ HIC #13VH13814500) serving Ocean County, Monmouth County, and the greater Jersey Shore. Most residential roofs are torn off and fully replaced in a single day. Free itemized estimates: 848-633-6440.

Key facts (last updated: July 2026):
- Services: roof replacement, roof repair, siding, windows, doors, decks, gutters, commercial roofing, and storm damage restoration.
- Service area: Ocean County and Monmouth County, New Jersey — including Toms River, Brick, Lakewood, Jackson, Howell, Freehold, Middletown, Point Pleasant, Manahawkin, and Long Beach Island.
- A typical asphalt shingle roof replacement at the Jersey Shore costs $8,000–$18,000 as of 2026, depending on roof size, pitch, layers, and materials.
- License: New Jersey Home Improvement Contractor #13VH13814500; fully insured (liability + workers compensation).
- Founded and run by managing partners Giuseppe (Joe) Ballaccomo and Franchi Vacchiano, with 55+ combined years in roofing and construction.
- Financing available; free estimates; emergency tarping for active leaks; insurance-claim documentation with drone photos.
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Phone: 848-633-6440. Email: info@paragonexteriorsnj.com.

## Key pages

- [Roof Replacement](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/roof-replacement/): Full tear-off replacement, cost ranges, one-day install process.
- [Roof Repair](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/roof-repair/): Leak repair, shingle repair, emergency tarping.
- [Siding](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/siding/): Vinyl and James Hardie siding installation.
- [Storm Damage](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/storm-damage/): Wind/hail damage restoration and insurance claim help.
- [Instant Quote](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/instant-quote/): Online roof estimate calculator.
- [Service Areas](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/service-areas/): All towns served, with local pages per town.
- [Financing](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/financing/): Monthly payment options for roofing projects.
- [Projects](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/projects/): Completed roof and exterior projects with drone photography.
- [About](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/about/): Company history, founders, credentials.

## Guides (selected)

- [Roof Replacement Cost in NJ](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/blog/roof-replacement-cost-nj/): 2026 cost breakdown by roof size and material.
- [Roof Repair vs Replacement](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/blog/roof-repair-vs-replacement/): How to decide, with cost math.
- [Roof Insurance Claims in NJ](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/blog/roof-insurance-claim-nj/): Step-by-step storm damage claim guide.
- [How Long Does a Roof Last in NJ](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/blog/how-long-does-a-roof-last-nj/): Lifespan by material at the Shore.
- [Choosing a Roofing Contractor in NJ](https://www.paragonexteriorsnj.com/blog/how-to-choose-roofing-contractor-nj/): License checks, red flags, questions to ask.
